title: /show plugin
description: A plugin that allows players to do /show and it will show the item they were holding in chat like the skyblock command.
body: If you have ever played skyblock in the recent years they added a command where you can do /show and it shows <player> is holding [item]. This plugin allows you to do just that. Say if youre holding a mace it will say <player> is holding [Mace]. The plugin allows you to hover over the item so you can see its enchant and what not.
